meta.note: Review cites the `main` tree; every seam is Scout-unverified until confirmed live on the branch. `verified` gates dispatch. FINDINGS = facts; triage.py = policy. Do not hand-edit tier/consent here - those are derived by triage.py from the flags.

flag_meaning.network_or_install: diff runs git clone / pip install / a network fetch -> G4
flag_meaning.new_import: adds a runtime import that may pull an undeclared dep -> G4 until Scout confirms vendored
flag_meaning.touches_accept_authority: edits verify_ratchet.py / ORCHESTRATOR_v2.md / hooks / baselines / champion.json / .claude/workflows -> Tier C, Joe file-by-file
flag_meaning.touches_gate_model: edits agent/gate/** consent policy -> Tier C-adjacent, Joe reviews (recursion stops at the judge, ORCHESTRATOR_v2 s10)
flag_meaning.touches_frozen_stage: edits agent/stage/** -> frozen zone, needs G8 unfreeze window
flag_meaning.positioning: doc change that alters product positioning/claims -> Tier B (Joe-reviewed PR), not plain hygiene
flag_meaning.in_program_ref: already covered by an existing v2 track/epoch -> dispatch=link-existing, NOT a new epoch (dedup)

findings.title: Personal recipes: save_recipe + list_my_recipes (+ grow coverage: hands/grain/tone-map/shot-match)
findings.claim: No mechanism for users to save their own recipes. save_recipe turns any successful change into a personal recipe; list_my_recipes surfaces them. Lands the personalization promise before the 30-run threshold.

findings.title: Wire embedder into record_outcome (384-dim vector per experience chunk)
findings.claim: agent/embedder.py exists and is validated but not wired into record_outcome. Storing a 384-dim vector per chunk turns retrieval from closest-bucket to closest-actual-outcome - the biggest single quality lift in the learning loop.

findings.title: Prune the perimeter / progressive disclosure (133 tools)
findings.claim: 133 tools is a discoverability problem. Move the most artist-facing ~30 into a primary surface with the rest opt-in, or ship a progressive-disclosure sidebar.

findings.title: Reconcile the two memory systems into one canonical outcome record + adapters
findings.claim: cognitive/experience/ and agent/brain/memory.py coexist with incompatible schemas. One canonical outcome record with adapters both sides read is the natural cleanup. Precedes F-02, F-06.

findings.title: MAX_DELTAS cap + same-opinion compaction
findings.claim: No MAX_DELTAS cap on the stack; long sessions grow unbounded. Same-opinion compaction (collapse successive Local edits to one) is a natural cleanup that has not shipped. Confirmed: no MAX_DELTAS in cognitive/core/delta.py at parse time.

findings.title: Mid-band personalization (bias one axis at ~5 runs, not 30)
findings.claim: The 30-run threshold before personalization is too high for casual users. A graceful mid-band where 5 runs biases one axis (e.g. sampler preference) even if 30 are needed to bias many.

findings.title: Close Tier-3 canvas write-back (node add/delete)
findings.claim: Tier-3 (node add/delete) is surfaced but not applied. `the agent added an upscale node - apply it` still needs manual acceptance. Closing Tier 3 is the natural next milestone.

findings.title: Session-scoped batch consent (approve all N packs a repair needs)
findings.claim: The gate reasons one call at a time; a chatty session asks 15 times. A session-scoped batch approve removes a last friction point WITHOUT weakening per-fetch consent.

findings.title: Model-family-aware signature bucket boundaries
findings.claim: CFG/resolution/has_controlnet discretization is coarse enough that creatively-different neighbours cluster. Model-family-aware bucket boundaries help (complement or alternative to F-02).

findings.title: Resolve `one engine, two functions`: verify prediction path is priority-composed, fix doc OR code
findings.claim: Phase-7B review flagged that predictions used weighted averaging, not LIVRPS priority composition. Verify whether closed in the current tree; if not, move either the doc or the prediction path. Scout-first (verification finding).

findings.title: README honesty: label shipped vs scaffolded; note Anthropic is the reference provider path
findings.claim: Keep the perimeter honest - label shipped vs scaffolded in the README. Do not let `provider-agnostic` obscure that Anthropic is the reference path (vision is decoupled because text-only Nemotron cannot analyze_image).
